title: Bridge Essay: Sitting through the emptiness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Sitting, through, the, emptiness..

**Sitting through the emptiness.** — J Anal Psychol. PMID: 34038584. DOI: 10.1111/1468-5922.12663. This article explores clinical encounters with experiences of the 'empty ego' which arise from early relational trauma. The ego'semptiness is held in repetitious complexes and arises out of affectively charged experiences between self and other which remain split-off from awareness. This kind of consciousness is viewed as dualistic, separating non-dual subjectivity from its dualistic objects of consciousness.
